name: CID Holdco, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview CID Holdco, Inc. (the Company, or CID Holdco, or CID), formerly known as SEE ID Inc., dba Dot AI (the Legacy Company or SEE ID), was incorporated in Delaware with its headquarters in Las Vegas, Nevada. The Company helps businesses transform their operations by optimizing safety, security and efficiency of operations through in-process tracking of resources.
